Text.Page:
Whoever made these little undead caimans must've been rich. Those big green eyes are made of aspidium. Castanic gem traders love the stuff!

I know where to sell them and how to cut and polish them. I just need the stones.

Want a share? Whenever you kill {@LinkCreature:8#4031#skeletal caimans} or {@LinkCreature:8#4031#caiman bonethralls}, just pry out those eyeballs.

Oh, yes. Look at them all!

Why waste such beauty on those little uglies
Just grab the stones off any {@LinkCreature:8#4031#skeletal caimans} or {@LinkCreature:8#4031#caiman bonethralls} you kill and we'll both be rich!
